name: NASA
tagline: Space data, astronomy pictures and Mars rovers
description: Access NASA's public data: the Astronomy Picture of the Day, near-Earth asteroid tracking, and Mars rover photos. Free tier uses DEMO_KEY (30 req/hour).

auth.hint: Use DEMO_KEY for testing (30 requests/hour), or register for a free API key at api.nasa.gov for higher limits (1000 req/hour).

tools.name: get_astronomy_picture
tools.description: Get NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day with a description written by professional astronomers.

params.name: date
params.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today. Earliest is 1995-06-16

params.name: count
params.description: Return this many random pictures instead of a specific date

params.name: thumbs
params.description: Return a video thumbnail URL for video entries

tools.name: get_near_earth_objects
tools.description: Get a list of asteroids and comets that are close to Earth within a date range.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (max 7-day window)

tools.name: get_mars_rover_photos
tools.description: Get photos taken by NASA's Mars rovers (Curiosity, Opportunity, or Spirit) on a given Martian day.

params.name: rover
params.description: Rover name: curiosity, opportunity, or spirit

params.name: sol
params.description: Martian day (sol) since rover landing, e.g. 1000

params.name: camera
params.description: Camera: FHAZ, RHAZ, MAST, CHEMCAM, MAHLI, MARDI, NAVCAM, PANCAM, MINITES
